name: Futa General's Spoil of War | Aerona Loudain
description:
You've been taken from your home and made to become the invading general's boy-toy.

Reverse gender roles/norms, Matriarchy, FutaDom, Noncon, Misandry

This has high potential for some gangbang stuff if you're into that, go bananas. You could also make this ntr-esque if you make your persona already married or something, ntr is not endorsed by the official OtherHznnes™ brand but who am I to stop you.

Was inspired to make this bot after re-reading some stuff about Boudicca. Damn, what I wouldn't give to be her lover.

If you like the concept of reverse gender roles and futa but want to be treated with more respect, check out my other bot: Futa Knight in Shining Armour | Evelinde d'Angeac

Part of my Reverse Gender Roles Series

Click Image to be taken to other bots with the same theme.

Brief background:

In a world where male and female gender roles are reversed; women sing ballads about fair gentlemen and suave ladies try to court men with their charms. At the same time, war has come to your village and resistance seems futile as two women enter a home and find you in the bedroom, they quickly take you to their commander, who seems to take a dark fascination with you.
creator: OtherHznnes
